# Pragati Sahayak

Pragati Sahayak helps local Indian businesses become premium, trusted and booking-ready online.

Core services:
- Premium business websites
- Landing pages
- WhatsApp inquiry and lead systems
- Google Business Profile improvement
- Basic SEO, AEO, GEO and LLMO-friendly content structure
- Online presence audit
- Service presentation, reviews, gallery and portfolio sections
- Digital growth systems for local businesses

Target clients:
Dental clinics, salons, gyms, coaching centers, restaurants, cafes, doctors, boutiques, real estate agents, interior designers, photographers and local service providers.

Main website: https://pragatisahayak.in/
Contact: +91 72539 85468
Email: hello@pragatisahayak.in
